title: Wabash Avenue
actors: Betty Grable, Victor Mature, Phil Harris
plot: Andy Clark discovers he was cheated out of a half interest in partner Mike's business, now a thriving dance hall in 1892 Chicago. Unable to win it back, Andy schemes to make Mike's position untenable. He also hopes to turn Ruby Su...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 2 nominations total
